description: Apply a material to the Stanford Bunny model and render the scene in Houdini. The scene at '/home/ga/HoudiniProjects/bunny_scene.hipnc' already has the bunny model imported with a Venice Sunset HDRI environment light. Your task is: (1) Create a new Principled Shader material in the /mat context (Material Palette or Network Editor), (2) Set its base color to gold (approximately R=0.83, G=0.68, B=0.21), (3) Set metallic to 0.9 and roughness to 0.2 for a shiny gold look, (4) Assign this material to the bunny geometry object, (5) Set up a Mantra render node at /out if not present, (6) Render a single frame to '/home/ga/HoudiniProjects/renders/bunny_render.png', and (7) Save the scene as '/home/ga/HoudiniProjects/bunny_material.hipnc'.
